nodes.line: Click on the character to start talking.
Hey, welcome back. Want to chill for a bit?

choices.text: Let us plan my next session.
I need to go offline soon.

nodes.line: Pretty good. The sunset vibe helps. How is your day going?
You can use the timer and todo panel on the right. Want a 25-minute focus block?
Press Start Focus on the right and I will keep you company.
Before you go, tell me one thing about tomorrow in AI mode so I can follow up later.
